hero.title: Communicating Clearly in English in
hero.subtitle: A practical, executive-level program for professionals and teams who lead, negotiate and influence across borders — where English is the working language and clarity defines outcomes.

overview.title: A working language is not the same as
overview.para1: This flagship program is designed for professionals and intact teams who operate daily in English with international counterparts. We move beyond grammar drills and generic business vocabulary to build the structural, strategic and cross-cultural communication skills that define credibility at a senior level.
overview.para2: Sessions are built around your real meetings, presentations and stakeholder conversations. Every participant leaves with a sharper voice, a clearer structure, and the confidence to be understood the first time.

tiles.v: 1:1, small group, intact team, or open-enrollment

challenges.title: What gets lost in translation is rarely the words.
challenges.intro: We work with the six communication gaps that quietly cost international teams time, deals and credibility every day.

items.d: Holding the room in a board meeting, defending a position, or thinking on your feet in a negotiation conducted in your second language.
Translating dense technical, financial or strategic content into clear, persuasive narratives that a global audience can follow.
Reading the unspoken codes across US, European, LATAM and APAC counterparts — directness, hierarchy, silence, disagreement.
Emails, reports and proposals that land with the right tone and weight — not just grammatically correct, but executively phrased.
Commanding attention on video, in hybrid meetings and across asynchronous channels where presence has to be engineered.
Closing the distance between what your people know and what they actually say — particularly under scrutiny from senior stakeholders.

outcomes.title: What participants
outcomes.intro: Outcomes are defined together with HR, L&D or the participant at the start of the engagement, and measured at the close.
items: Present complex ideas with clarity, structure and executive presence in English.
Lead and contribute to international meetings with confidence and influence.
Negotiate, push back and align across cultures without losing nuance or authority.
Write emails, reports and proposals that read as credible at any seniority level.
Handle Q&A, objections and difficult conversations with composure under pressure.
Build a personal communication style — not a generic one — that travels globally.

items.quote: If you need Business English classes or general English classes, you should take them with Ian. I have studied with him for about six months and I'm more confident and fluent. I recommend 100%.
items.name: Marcelo
items.title: Tax Compliance Manager

items.quote: I started practicing my English with Ian even before working in a fully English-speaking environment. Once again, with his guidance, I have polished key aspects of my communication.
items.name: Constanza
items.title: Sales Manager

items.d: Preparing for expanded international scope, secondments or board exposure.
Operating daily across HQ and regional offices in English as a working language.
Designing communication and leadership development for global workforces.
Managing global teams or representing the business with international stakeholders.

facilitator.subtitle: Founder · Kennedy Consulting & Coaching
facilitator.para1: A bilingual US-native communication consultant and coach with over 9 years of international experience across Latin America, North America, Europe, the Middle East and Asia. Ian works with professionals and teams inside multinationals where English carries the weight of the business.
facilitator.para2: His approach blends executive communication, structured thinking and cross-cultural fluency — grounded in real business contexts rather than generic curriculum. Clients have included professionals from PLACEHOLDER CLIENTS and other global organizations.

tiles.v: Teaching English as a Foreign Language (TEFL) · 9+ yrs

cta.title: Bring this workshop to
cta.intro: Request a 30-minute briefing call. We will discuss your team, your communication priorities and how the program can be tailored to your context.

faq.title: Answers to frequently asked questions about workshop format, audience, customization, and delivery.

items.a: No. This workshop focuses on professional communication in English within real business environments. The emphasis is on meetings, presentations, stakeholder communication, and communicating clearly under pressure rather than traditional language instruction.
The workshop is generally designed for professionals with an intermediate to advanced level of English (approximately B1-C1). Content and activities can be adapted based on the needs of the group.

items.q: Can the workshop be customized for our organization?
items.a: Yes. Every engagement is tailored to the client's communication goals, business context, industry, and participant profile.

items.q: Is the workshop delivered virtually or in person?
items.a: Both options are available. Sessions can be delivered virtually, in person, or in a hybrid format depending on your team's needs and location.

items.q: Who is this workshop designed for?
items.a: The workshop is ideal for professionals, managers, and leaders who regularly communicate in English with colleagues, clients, headquarters, or stakeholders in international business environments.
Workshops are typically designed for groups of up to 12 participants to encourage discussion, interaction, and practical application. Larger group formats can also be discussed.

items.q: What makes this different from traditional Business English training?
items.a: The focus is not only on language accuracy, but on communication effectiveness. Participants work on how they communicate in real business situations, including meetings, presentations, updates, and stakeholder interactions.
Depending on the client's needs, workshops can be followed by individual coaching, additional team sessions, or customized development programs focused on specific communication goals.

footer.tagline: Speak with confidence · Communicate with impact · Advance your career
